title: The Herta Pack
description: A PVP pack that is customized set to The Herta from Honkai: Star Rail
body:
If you are a fan of Honkai: Star Rail, especially a character known as The Herta, this texture pack is just for you. I decided to make a PvP texture pack for one of my favorite characters in Honkai:Star Rail. 

# About this
TheHerta Pack is based more in the aspects of PVP, desgined more for combat and SMP. This pack comes with different variants, such as default, scythe, and the original.

**Changes**
- Lower Shield
- Particles
- Lower Fire
- GUI
- Custom Totem
- Sword
- Golden Apple
- Ender Pearl


![A customized netheritre sword that is fually changed into a scythe. Comes in with a deafault netherite version to those who prefer a default netherite sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61b897c8e7457b9864e69cdac179e3b8b9a42bea.png)

A customized netheritre sword that is fually changed into a scythe. Comes in with a deafault netherite version to those who prefer a default netherite sword


![Custom Golden Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d8f88515d3c8f3f239d12ac0cabbc53ed905e4b.png)

A customized golden apple, Comes in with a deafualt version to those who prefer a deafult golden apple
